name: Chicken Divan
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breasts, cooked and cut into bite sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place thawed broccoli in an 8x10 dish.
2. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the broccoli.
3. Layer cooked chicken over the broccoli.
4. Repeat layering with more cooked chicken, then Parmesan cheese.
5. In a medium bowl, mix cream of chicken soup, mayonnaise, and cheddar cheese.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the chicken layers.
7. Sprinkle remaining Parmesan cheese, paprika, salt, and pepper on top.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven until golden and bubbly.
